name: Polie all-push hole (the orphaned NFR-C4 adversarial) — one hole where every player pushes (no base net winner) AND no polie is checked => pts=0 => the hole is skipped => EMPTY SettlementEdge[]. Not a crash, not a phantom split, not a zero-cent edge.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the F1 polie modifier (Story 2.3) homing the NFR-C4 all-push case. base points 0 (all nets = par) + polie 0 (no claims) => per-hole pts = 0 => compute-foursome's `if (pts === 0) continue` skips it => no cross-cell money => empty edges. Proves no phantom money on a hole with no winner and no claim.
_handCalc: One hole (par4), all nets = par => low-ball tie (0), skin 0, team-total tie (0), net-skins equal-level no-blood (0). No polie claims => polie 0. pts = 0 => hole skipped => no money moves. perPlayer all 0; edges = []; ledgerTotal = 0c. (NFR-C4: no winner + no claim => empty edges, never a phantom split.)
